---
title: "Lyrics Report"
format: html
---

# Joanna Newsom Lyrics Report

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false

library(gt)
library(dplyr)

report <- readRDS("Report.rds")

report |>
  mutate(
    Lyrics = gsub("\n", "<br>", Lyrics)
  ) |>
  gt() |>
  fmt_markdown(columns = Lyrics) |>
  tab_header(
    title = "Joanna Newsom Lyrics Collection"
  ) |>
  cols_label(
    Title = "Track Information",
    Lyrics = "Song Lyrics"
  )
```
